ValidationRule.description: Rule restricts user from being able to enter duplicate values in the Primary, Secondary, Additional Delay fields
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(pro_Primary_Delay__c))), OR( TEXT(pro_Primary_Delay__c) = TEXT(pro_Secondary_Delay__c), TEXT(pro_Primary_Delay__c) = TEXT(pro_Additional_Delay__c), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(pro_Secondary_Delay__c))), TEXT(pro_Secondary_Delay__c) = TEXT(pro_Additional_Delay__c) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Primary Delay, Secondary Delay, and Additional Delay cannot have the same value. Please select different values.
